notes: Worker C reviewed batch for NET bank UI, first world_log runtime slice, and remaining HUD todo records.

entries.gt_dfa96c8061f31a: Wrong door triggered. The exit changed.
entries.gt_27ca8663eb87e0: Wrong door active on the route.
entries.gt_9f18e5455229e0: You passed in the procession tail. Route marked, PSI sagged.
entries.gt_aaf4191d4cb69e: Cult procession route sent to the liquidators by radio.
entries.gt_0b0e5fdbd48cde: Flesh mark worked. You were let into the tail.
entries.gt_aa88158d8bb85a: Cult procession disrupted${e.zoneId !== undefined ? ` в зоне ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}.
entries.gt_67007dd0216c43: Samosbor interrupted the cult procession${e.zoneId !== undefined ? `: зона ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}. Pressure fell.
entries.gt_d17e3ab4b1731c: Pressure from the disrupted procession fell${e.zoneId !== undefined ? `: зона ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}.
entries.gt_5c67bc1bf99331: Cult procession ${outcome || 'затихла'}${e.zoneId !== undefined ? `: зона ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}. Pressure fell.
entries.gt_34e08bafff22d6: Cult procession moving${e.zoneId !== undefined ? ` в зоне ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}. Yield the corridor.
entries.gt_856c08453a5412: Istotit: extra line entered at the hermodoor${target}. ${consequence}
entries.gt_5555aac2c9463f: Istotit: the hermodoor line stayed empty${target}. ${consequence}
entries.gt_ad855524d95a56: Maronary started${e.zoneId !== undefined ? `: зона ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}. Check the door number against the map; do not go toward the green glow.
entries.gt_0da69492ee0996: Samosbor started${e.zoneId !== undefined ? `: зона ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}. Find a hermodoor.
entries.gt_e256e43264aabf: Zone ${e.zoneId !== undefined ? e.zoneId + 1 : '?'} is under samosbor. Map is stale.
entries.gt_fd13ce977fbbbc: Samosbor all-clear. Check the map and doors.
entries.gt_f56aa45a7c932f: Hermodoor borer at the door: ${String(e.data?.roomName ?? 'укрытие')}. There is time to react.
entries.gt_87aea1c4dd56b5: Fog boss appeared${e.zoneId !== undefined ? ` в зоне ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}.
entries.gt_212854d6cc3689: Fog boss destroyed${e.zoneId !== undefined ? ` в зоне ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}.
entries.gt_d8c83964b73a57: Smog${e.zoneId !== undefined ? ` в зоне ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}. Need a filter, cloth, or detour.
entries.gt_c6a48bfce36cd5: Smog source found${e.zoneId !== undefined ? ` в зоне ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}. It can be shut off.
entries.gt_6872359c94fc05: Smog source shut off${e.zoneId !== undefined ? ` в зоне ${e.zoneId + 1}` : ''}.
entries.gt_0599bce303b007: ${e.actorName ?? 'Косторез'} spotted a target. The windup will be visible.
entries.gt_04a0fb3639dde5: ${e.targetName ?? 'Цель'} slipped out from under the ${monsterName(e.monsterKind)} swing.
entries.gt_016fe1628a0ecf: Black cleanup knocks at the door. Check the mask number and do not show the sample.
entries.gt_31eb74342804d4: Green Dog howled by the passage. The pack splits targets: metal, can, or shot will break the rush.
entries.gt_0ba18df49376ca: Green Dog bolted from loud metal. For a few seconds the pack loses the target.
entries.gt_f2939ded595f29: Fog Sharks formed a pack. Leave the fog, close a door, or hold an angle.
entries.gt_593c40a524c375: Fog Shark gas bladder exploded: ${String(e.data?.hitCount ?? 0)} targets. Keep fire at range.
entries.gt_2b634cef6352e4: Head slug broke off the host and is looking for a new body.
entries.gt_6f21b07264a140: Head slug locked in the quarantine circuit.
entries.gt_44cf28e6b288f2: Gnilushka accepted help and did not become a fight. The rumor will remember restraint.
entries.gt_ec98cbc2bf1d67: Gnilushka was talked down without a shot. She stays dangerous only in a corner.
entries.gt_fe1c5d2bd3f83d: Gnilushka was wounded. Now she runs from people and cuts only when cornered.
entries.gt_94b75234452482: Gnilushka left along the NII route. A voluntary scraping stayed on the floor.
entries.gt_f70f555126c41e: Room Settler is scratching the apartment. Noise and theft will raise its anger.
entries.gt_ba2cc90dc818da: Room Settler quieted after a report or help to neighbors.
entries.gt_699114331f070a: Room Settler left the room: the corridor became part of the apartment.
entries.gt_5c8489f84d1e8e: NET terminal rejected the hack. Safeguard came out on failure.
entries.gt_b6e470dc87d02c: NET terminal rejected the hack. The white trace is already marked.
entries.gt_5b11405d9f4a3b: Chervie gave a local NET impulse. Nearby people hear someone else's order.
entries.gt_cbffbf013b6085: Chervie is holding to the screen or server rig again.
entries.gt_a2db10ef8f4206: Chervie source disconnected. The avatar lost green protection and speed.
entries.gt_595fc5254f8b4d: Chervie printed a false order. Do not follow the command on the screen.
entries.gt_5d79bd275ea73a: Emergency panel: ${String(e.data?.action ?? 'контур')} in zone ${e.zoneId !== undefined ? e.zoneId + 1 : '?'}.
entries.gt_62f6baf0e4753a: Quiet block exposed: no siren, just a cult mark.
entries.gt_9ef27ea9e4ccea: Black palm removed. Quiet block is ordinary again.
entries.gt_f7d25d8ce6c990: Govnyak bought${e.targetName ? ` у ${e.targetName}` : ''}. Check the debt.
entries.gt_760f7eab8373ed: Zhelemish skin enabled: protection, water drain, and PSI drain.
entries.gt_e64e2826f88be7: Govnyak took effect. Debt is rising.
entries.gt_7c73d9dd61820a: Zhelemish gave a bad reaction: water and PSI sagged.
entries.gt_b0ca2cd10a1ac4: Rough Govnyak broke loose: cough, noise, and debt.
entries.gt_82d3934ea5ffd3: Govnyak debt removed. Aim is stable.
entries.gt_d6a883441857b9: Concrete-Eater finished off. The weak wall is safe.
entries.gt_c8f437a4f7e4a2: Gnilushka killed. This was not an ordinary fight with a beast.
entries.gt_20eb3ac25ecd46: Door repeat marked. Do not look into the source.
entries.gt_49f4c91c593f04: Move away from the lift. Target thrown off by noise.
